result:
The spec is fully satisfied. I added the three missing operations to `CsvRow.cs`:

- **`EscapeField`** — returns the field verbatim unless `NeedsQuoting` holds, in which case it wraps it in double-quotes and doubles internal quotes.
- **`JoinRow`** — escapes each field and joins with commas; the empty list yields the empty string via `string.Join`.
- **`SplitRow`** — a single-pass parser: a field starting with `"` is read until the next un-doubled quote (doubled quotes contribute one literal quote, commas/CR/LF inside are content), otherwise the field runs to the next comma or end of line. The empty line produces a single empty field, and a trailing comma yields a final empty field, so `SplitRow(JoinRow(fields))` round-trips every non-empty list.

`dotnet build` passes cleanly with 0 warnings and 0 errors, and `NeedsQuoting` was left untouched.
